anatomy.description: Outer row surface. Background: --surface/neutral/default (#f1f2f4). Min-height: 56px. Padding: 8px (all sides). Width: 426px.
24×24px icon at the leading edge. Optional — shown by default. Placeholder in Figma: Customer-Icon/phone-call.
Holds title, and optionally subtitle and description. Max-width: 280px. Gap between lines: 4px (multi-line types).
Small label above the title. Manrope Regular, 12px, --text/placeholder (#636377). Shown in 'full' type only.
Primary action label. Manrope SemiBold, 14px, --text/primary (#1d1d23). Required in all types.
Supporting text below the title. Manrope Regular, 12px, --text/placeholder (#636377). Shown in 'title + description' and 'full' types.
22×22px icon at the trailing edge. Optional — shown by default as a chevron-right. Can be replaced with a custom element (toggle, checkbox, etc.).

types.name: only Title
types.description: Minimal layout. Shows title only (plus optional left and right icons). Title is whitespace-nowrap.

types.name: title + description
types.description: Title with a supporting description below it. Title is whitespace-nowrap. Description width is constrained.

types.name: full
types.description: Three lines of text: subtitle above the title, then description below. Subtitle and description share the same typographic style.

variantNote: No structural variants. Content type is the primary dimension (only Title, title + description, full).
stateNote: No interactive states defined in Figma. TODO: Confirm hover, pressed, focus, and disabled states.
usageContext: Individual row unit placed inside the Action Menu container (Sheet or Popover).
May also appear in other list-like surfaces where the same row structure applies.
Confirmed in Dojo Customer App (node 1361:13772) and Dojo Driver App (node 2007:325).
notes: Three content types: only Title (5086:602), title + description (5126:427), full (5126:437).
Left icon (24px) and right icon (22px) are both optional and shown by default.
Right icon can be replaced with a custom element via rightIconSelector prop.
The placeholder left icon in Figma is Customer-Icon/phone-call. Replace with the appropriate icon per action.
No interactive states defined. TODO: Confirm hover, pressed, focus, and disabled states.
TODO: Confirm whether items dismiss the parent menu on tap.
TODO: Confirm ARIA role (menuitem vs. listitem depending on container).
